changes.summary: Scaffolded the platform/ directory with FastAPI app, alembic wired to DATABASE_URL, and pytest-compatible test setup. Fixed stdlib naming conflict for the 'platform' package using sys.modules eviction in conftest. pytest --collect-only collects test_health.py successfully.

Scaffolded the platform/ directory with FastAPI app, alembic wired to DATABASE_URL, and pytest-compatible test setup. Fixed stdlib naming conflict for the 'platform' package using sys.modules eviction in conftest. pytest --collect-only collects test_health.py successfully.
